test_cases.brief_summary: Educational urban gardening channel (45K subs), balcony tomatoes video, calm/practical tone, 10 minutes — existing example, idea generation skipped
test_cases.editorial_naturalness_note: Zero tells; the script inhabits the calm educational YouTube register with precision, particularly the section openers that lead with the core claim before developing it.

test_cases.brief_summary: Tech review channel (300K subs), portable projector review, fast-paced/opinionated tone, 12 minutes — simulated deliverable, idea generation skipped
test_cases.editorial_naturalness_note: Two minor tells — one flat section opener and a slightly measured opinionated register that doesn't fully match the intensity of a 300K-sub tech reviewer's voice.

test_cases.brief_summary: College cooking channel (8K subs), ramen upgrades, casual/fun tone, 7 minutes — simulated deliverable, idea generation included (full 7-step pipeline)
test_cases.editorial_naturalness_note: One minor structural tell ('OK so here's the thing' as generic casual-YouTube transition); the casual register is competent but slightly more polished than an authentic small-channel college creator would write.
